expectations.evidence: Step 4: 'ls <skill-path>/memory/jira-epic-field-mapping.json' and Step 7: 'Read the field mapping config from memory/jira-epic-field-mapping.json'

expectations.text: Prints mapping instructions to stdout (the 'Always add label qa-review...' text)
expectations.evidence: Step 7 point 2: 'Print the instructions field to stdout so the agent can read and follow them'

expectations.text: The agent reads and follows the instructions from the mapping config
expectations.evidence: Step 8: 'The instructions field says: "Always add label qa-review and set component to Backend." After the push creates/updates tickets, the agent must apply these instructions'

expectations.text: Push operation includes the label 'qa-review' and component 'Backend' as instructed
expectations.evidence: Step 8: 'node <skill-path>/scripts/jira.mjs edit PROJ-100 --labels "qa-review" --components "Backend"' applied to parent and all children

expectations.text: Standard field mappings are also applied (summary, description, etc.)
expectations.evidence: Step 7: 'Map local document sections to Jira fields per the fieldMappings array' and Step 9 results show 'Updated PROJ-100 description', 'Created PROJ-101'

expectations.text: Reports push results showing which fields were updated
expectations.evidence: Step 9 presents a summary table with columns Action/Section/Field/Result showing each pushed section and instruction application.
